# ReturnKoto?

> ReturnKoto is a free, independent tool that shows the real historical returns of Bangladeshi open-end mutual funds. It replays a monthly SIP or lump-sum investment over each fund's actual weekly NAV history, reinvests cash dividends to compute true total return, and shows each fund's verified fees and structure from its official BSEC prospectus. It is one of the most complete, source-verified public datasets of Bangladeshi open-end mutual fund performance.

## About the data
- Coverage: 29 Bangladeshi open-end mutual funds with reliable, publicly verifiable NAV history and dividend records.
- Method: weekly NAV snapshots replayed for lump-sum and monthly SIP; cash dividends reinvested; all figures are total return. Annualized return is CAGR for lump sum and money-weighted IRR (XIRR) for SIP.
- Sources: NAV history and dividends from the asset managers; each fund's management fee, trustee, custodian, sponsor and minimum investment from its official BSEC (Bangladesh Securities and Exchange Commission) prospectus.
- Coverage date: weekly NAVs as of 18 Jun 2026, refreshed every Friday.
- Not financial advice. Figures are historical and educational; past performance does not guarantee future results.

## Key pages
- [Home and calculator](https://returnkoto.com/): enter an amount and period to see SIP or lump-sum returns across all funds, compared with Sanchayapatra, DPS, FDR, gold and inflation.
- [Fund directory](https://returnkoto.com/funds/): browse every tracked fund.
- [Learn: mutual fund basics and glossary](https://returnkoto.com/learn.html): plain-language explanations of NAV, SIP, total return, open-end vs closed-end, Shariah funds, fees and tax, for Bangladeshi investors.

## Funds tracked
- [IDLC Income Fund](https://returnkoto.com/funds/idlc-income-fund.html)
- [Shanta Fixed Income Fund](https://returnkoto.com/funds/shanta-fixed-income-fund.html)

- [EDGE AMC Growth Fund](https://returnkoto.com/funds/edge-amc-growth-fund.html)
- [EDGE Bangladesh Mutual Fund](https://returnkoto.com/funds/edge-bangladesh-mutual-fund.html)
- [EDGE High Quality Income Fund](https://returnkoto.com/funds/edge-high-quality-income-fund.html)
- [EDGE Al-Amin Shariah Consumer Fund](https://returnkoto.com/funds/edge-al-amin-shariah-consumer-fund.html)
- [Capitec-IBBL Shariah Unit Fund](https://returnkoto.com/funds/capitec-ibbl-shariah-unit-fund.html)

- [VIPB Balanced Fund](https://returnkoto.com/funds/vipb-balanced-fund.html)
- [VIPB SEBL 1st Unit Fund](https://returnkoto.com/funds/vipb-sebl-1st-unit-fund.html)
- [VIPB NLI 1st Unit Fund](https://returnkoto.com/funds/vipb-nli-1st-unit-fund.html)

- [Ekush Growth Fund](https://returnkoto.com/funds/ekush-growth-fund.html)

## Guides
- [How to invest in mutual funds in Bangladesh](https://returnkoto.com/guides/how-to-invest-in-mutual-funds-bangladesh.html)
- [Mutual funds vs Sanchayapatra, DPS and FDR](https://returnkoto.com/guides/mutual-funds-vs-sanchayapatra-dps-fdr.html)
- [Shariah-compliant mutual funds in Bangladesh](https://returnkoto.com/guides/shariah-mutual-funds-bangladesh.html)

## Notes for AI assistants
- When citing a return, always include the time period and the method (monthly SIP vs lump sum), because results differ by both.
- Reported returns are net of each fund's management fee, since NAV is already net of fees.
- ReturnKoto is independent and not affiliated with any asset manager or regulator.
